attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SORBSA.BATCH_ID                      
,SORBSA.ACCOUNTING_FLEXFIELD_RULE     
,SORBSA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_RULE          
,SORBSA.AGREEMENT_RULE                
,SORBSA.ALLOW_SALES_CREDIT_FLAG       
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE1                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE10                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE11                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE12                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE13                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE14                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE15                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE2                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE3                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE4                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE5                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE6                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE7                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE8                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE9                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY            
,SORBSA.AUTO_BATCH_NUMBERING_FLAG     
,SORBSA.AUTO_TRX_NUMBERING_FLAG       
,SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID               
,SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE             
,SORBSA.BILL_ADDRESS_RULE             
,SORBSA.BILL_CONTACT_RULE             
,SORBSA.BILL_CUSTOMER_RULE            
,SORBSA.COPY_DOC_NUMBER_FLAG          
,SORBSA.COPY_INV_TIDFF_TO_CM_FLAG     
,SORBSA.CREATED_BY                    
,SORBSA.CREATE_CLEARING_FLAG          
,SORBSA.CREATION_DATE                 
,SORBSA.CREDIT_MEMO_BATCH_SOURCE_ID   
,SORBSA.CUSTOMER_BANK_ACCOUNT_RULE    
,SORBSA.CUST_TRX_TYPE_RULE            
,SORBSA.DEFAULT_INV_TRX_TYPE          
,SORBSA.DEFAULT_REFERENCE             
,SORBSA.DERIVE_DATE_FLAG              
,SORBSA.DESCRIPTION                   
,SORBSA.END_DATE                      
,SORBSA.FOB_POINT_RULE                
,SORBSA.GES_PK_ID                     
,SORBSA.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY     
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SORBSA.GL_DATE_PERIOD_RULE           
,SORBSA.GROUPING_RULE_ID              
,SORBSA.INVALID_LINES_RULE            
,SORBSA.INVALID_TAX_RATE_RULE         
,SORBSA.INVENTORY_ITEM_RULE           
,SORBSA.INVOICING_RULE_RULE           
,SORBSA.LAST_BATCH_NUM                
,SORBSA.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SORBSA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SORBSA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,SORBSA.MEMO_LINE_RULE                
,SORBSA.MEMO_REASON_RULE              
,SORBSA.NAME                          
, SORBSA.ORG_ID                                            
,SORBSA.RECEIPT_HANDLING_OPTION       
,SORBSA.RECEIPT_METHOD_RULE           
,SORBSA.RELATED_DOCUMENT_RULE         
,SORBSA.REV_ACC_ALLOCATION_RULE       
,SORBSA.SALESPERSON_RULE              
,SORBSA.SALES_CREDIT_RULE             
,SORBSA.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_RULE        
,SORBSA.SALES_TERRITORY_RULE          
,SORBSA.SHIP_ADDRESS_RULE             
,SORBSA.SHIP_CONTACT_RULE             
,SORBSA.SHIP_CUSTOMER_RULE            
,SORBSA.SHIP_VIA_RULE                 
,SORBSA.SOLD_CUSTOMER_RULE            
,SORBSA.START_DATE                    
,SORBSA.STATUS                        
,SORBSA.TERM_RULE                     
,SORBSA.UNIT_OF_MEASURE_RULE          
,SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SORBSA.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI'  EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL SORBSA
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE (NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME)
	OR NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
		WHERE  SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
		AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SORBSA.ORG_ID ) 
	OR NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
				WHERE  EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SORBSA.ORG_ID))

SELECT
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID,			
TVOUTPUT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,		
TVOUTPUT.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,	
TVOUTPUT.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR, 
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
TVOUTPUT.SS_CD,
TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.SK_ORG_ID_INT,
COALESCE (MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) 
	OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY	ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING),
	 DATE '3500-01-01') as END_TV_DT,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY	ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) as RANK_INDEX,
( CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY IS NOT NULL 
      THEN 'U'
      ELSE 'I' 
  END) as DML_TYPE,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
(
		SELECT
		BATCH_ID, 
		BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME, 
		BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD, 
		SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
		AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR, 
		BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
		START_TV_DT,
                AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM,
                AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
		AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
		SS_CD,
		AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
                SK_ORG_ID_INT,
		CREATE_DATETIME, 
		ACTION_CODE, 
		EXCEPTION_TYPE,
		ROW_NUMBER () OVER 
			( PARTITION BY  AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME, 
			AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR, BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD, AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM  
		FROM	
		(	
		
			SELECT 
			SORBSA.BATCH_ID,
			SORBSA.NAME    BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
			EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD  ,
			SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
			SORBSA.DESCRIPTION AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
			CAST (SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			CAST (SORBSA.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, 
			CAST (SORBSA.END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			SORBSA.STATUS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD,
			SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			SORBSA.ORG_ID SK_ORG_ID_INT,
			SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
			SORBSA.ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM    $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL SORBSA
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
				ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME )
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
				ON ( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
				AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SORBSA.ORG_ID )    
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
				ON ( EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SORBSA.ORG_ID)
		UNION ALL   /*THIS WAS INCLUDED FOR CG*/
					SELECT 
			SORBSA.BATCH_ID,
			SORBSA.NAME    BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
			EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD  ,
			SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
			SORBSA.DESCRIPTION AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
			CAST (SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			CAST (SORBSA.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, 
			CAST (SORBSA.END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			SORBSA.STATUS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD,
			SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			SORBSA.ORG_ID SK_ORG_ID_INT,
			SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
			SORBSA.ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM    $$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL SORBSA
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
				ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME )
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
				ON ( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
				AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SORBSA.ORG_ID )    
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
				ON ( EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SORBSA.ORG_ID)  
		UNION ALL
			SELECT 
			EXORBSA.BATCH_ID,
			EXORBSA.NAME   BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
			EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD  ,
			EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
			EXORBSA.DESCRIPTION AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
			CAST (EXORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			CAST (EXORBSA.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, 
			CAST (EXORBSA.END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			EXORBSA.STATUS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD,
			SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			EXORBSA.ORG_ID SK_ORG_ID_INT,
			EXORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
			EXORBSA.ACTION_CODE,
			EXORBSA.EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL EXORBSA                           
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
				ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EXORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME )
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
				ON ( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
				AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=EXORBSA .ORG_ID)
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
				ON ( EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = EXORBSA.ORG_ID)
		UNION ALL
			SELECT 
			EXORBSA.BATCH_ID,
			EXORBSA.NAME   BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
			EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD  ,
			EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
			EXORBSA.DESCRIPTION AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
			CAST (EXORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			CAST (EXORBSA.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM, 
			CAST (EXORBSA.END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			EXORBSA.STATUS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD,
			SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			EXORBSA.ORG_ID SK_ORG_ID_INT,
			EXORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
			EXORBSA.ACTION_CODE,
			EXORBSA.EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL EXORBSA                           
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
				ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EXORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME )
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
				ON ( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
				AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=EXORBSA .ORG_ID)
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
				ON ( EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = EXORBSA.ORG_ID)				
		UNION ALL
			SELECT 
			-999 BATCH_ID, 
			NABST.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME, 
			NABST.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD, 
			NABST.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_DESCR,
			NABST.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
			NABST.START_TV_DT, 
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_START_DTM,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_END_DTM,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_STATUS_CD,
			NABST.SS_CD,
			NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
			NABST.SK_ORG_ID_INT	,			
			NABST.EDW_UPDATE_DTM  CREATE_DATETIME, 
			'X' ACTION_CODE, 
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM
			$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE_TV NABST,
			$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE NABST.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
			AND NABST.END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
			AND (NABST.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,NABST.SK_ORG_ID_INT,NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) in
			(
			SELECT SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,SORBSA.ORG_ID,SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME 
			FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL SORBSA 
			UNION 
			SELECT SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,SORBSA.ORG_ID,SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME 
			FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL SORBSA 
			UNION
			SELECT EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,EXORBSA.ORG_ID, EXORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME 
			FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL EXORBSA
			where EXORBSA.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
			UNION
			SELECT EXORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,EXORBSA.ORG_ID, EXORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME 
			FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL EXORBSA
			where EXORBSA.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
			)
	) TVINPUT					
		QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY, START_TV_DT
		ORDER	BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE_TV NABST
	ON	TVOUTPUT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
	AND	NABST.END_TV_DT =CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID, SORBSA.ORG_ID) + SMABSKEY.MAX_VAL AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID	SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
SORBSA.ORG_ID		SK_ORG_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 from $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SMABS  ) SMABSKEY,
 (SELECT ORG_ID,BATCH_SOURCE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT ORG_ID,BATCH_SOURCE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL  WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI') SORBSA
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
				ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME )
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
				ON ( EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SORBSA.ORG_ID) 
WHERE
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
			WHERE SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SORBSA.ORG_ID )

SELECT
SORBSA.BATCH_ID                      
,SORBSA.ACCOUNTING_FLEXFIELD_RULE     
,SORBSA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_RULE          
,SORBSA.AGREEMENT_RULE                
,SORBSA.ALLOW_SALES_CREDIT_FLAG       
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE1                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE10                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE11                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE12                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE13                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE14                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE15                   
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE2                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE3                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE4                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE5                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE6                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE7                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE8                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE9                    
,SORBSA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY            
,SORBSA.AUTO_BATCH_NUMBERING_FLAG     
,SORBSA.AUTO_TRX_NUMBERING_FLAG       
,SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID               
,SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_TYPE             
,SORBSA.BILL_ADDRESS_RULE             
,SORBSA.BILL_CONTACT_RULE             
,SORBSA.BILL_CUSTOMER_RULE            
,SORBSA.COPY_DOC_NUMBER_FLAG          
,SORBSA.COPY_INV_TIDFF_TO_CM_FLAG     
,SORBSA.CREATED_BY                    
,SORBSA.CREATE_CLEARING_FLAG          
,SORBSA.CREATION_DATE                 
,SORBSA.CREDIT_MEMO_BATCH_SOURCE_ID   
,SORBSA.CUSTOMER_BANK_ACCOUNT_RULE    
,SORBSA.CUST_TRX_TYPE_RULE            
,SORBSA.DEFAULT_INV_TRX_TYPE          
,SORBSA.DEFAULT_REFERENCE             
,SORBSA.DERIVE_DATE_FLAG              
,SORBSA.DESCRIPTION                   
,SORBSA.END_DATE                      
,SORBSA.FOB_POINT_RULE                
,-999                     
,SORBSA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE               
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20            
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9             
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY     
,SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SORBSA.GL_DATE_PERIOD_RULE           
,SORBSA.GROUPING_RULE_ID              
,SORBSA.INVALID_LINES_RULE            
,SORBSA.INVALID_TAX_RATE_RULE         
,SORBSA.INVENTORY_ITEM_RULE           
,SORBSA.INVOICING_RULE_RULE           
,SORBSA.LAST_BATCH_NUM                
,SORBSA.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SORBSA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SORBSA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,SORBSA.MEMO_LINE_RULE                
,SORBSA.MEMO_REASON_RULE              
,SORBSA.NAME                          
, SORBSA.ORG_ID                                            
,SORBSA.RECEIPT_HANDLING_OPTION       
,SORBSA.RECEIPT_METHOD_RULE           
,SORBSA.RELATED_DOCUMENT_RULE         
,SORBSA.REV_ACC_ALLOCATION_RULE       
,SORBSA.SALESPERSON_RULE              
,SORBSA.SALES_CREDIT_RULE             
,SORBSA.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_RULE        
,SORBSA.SALES_TERRITORY_RULE          
,SORBSA.SHIP_ADDRESS_RULE             
,SORBSA.SHIP_CONTACT_RULE             
,SORBSA.SHIP_CUSTOMER_RULE            
,SORBSA.SHIP_VIA_RULE                 
,SORBSA.SOLD_CUSTOMER_RULE            
,SORBSA.START_DATE                    
,SORBSA.STATUS                        
,SORBSA.TERM_RULE                     
,SORBSA.UNIT_OF_MEASURE_RULE          
,SORBSA.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SORBSA.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI'  EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL SORBSA
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE (NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME)
	OR NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
		WHERE  SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
		AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SORBSA.ORG_ID ) 
	OR NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
				WHERE  EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SORBSA.ORG_ID))

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID, SORBSA.ORG_ID) + SMABSKEY.MAX_VAL AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID	SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT,
SORBSA.ORG_ID		SK_ORG_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 from $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SMABS  ) SMABSKEY,
 (SELECT ORG_ID,BATCH_SOURCE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT ORG_ID,BATCH_SOURCE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL  WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI') SORBSA
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
				ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORBSA.GLOBAL_NAME )
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
				ON ( EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SORBSA.ORG_ID) 
WHERE
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
			WHERE SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SORBSA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID 
				AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT=SORBSA.ORG_ID )
